title: stevia jujuyensis
intro: Stevia jujuyensis, also known as Stevia selloana, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae) native to the Andes mountains in South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Stevia jujuyensis include its potential to aid in weight loss, improve blood sugar control, and reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease. Stevia jujuyensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used as a sweetener due to its natural sweetness derived from its steviol glycosides.
